goals.title: Harden codex metrics updater validation
goals.notes: Added negative cost/token validation with tests; validated with init/show; pytest passed after installing pytest into .venv.

goals.title: Add first retrospective and checkpoint commit
goals.notes: Added first retrospective, verified 10 passing tests, and completed serialized smoke flow for init/update/show before creating a checkpoint commit.

goals.title: Add repository .gitignore for non-source artifacts
goals.notes: Added repository .gitignore for caches, local virtualenvs, IDE settings, and OS noise; verified required metrics/report/retro files are not ignored.

goals.title: Assess and improve updater test coverage
goals.notes: Expanded tests to cover missing stateful CLI behavior: required title on create, updating existing tasks without title, explicit timestamps, negative attempts, and report ordering; 15 tests passed and smoke flow validated.

goals.title: Harden metrics business validation and safe init
goals.notes: Added strict task-record validation, status/failure_reason and timestamp business rules, safe init with --force, concise CLI error messages, 22 passing tests, and sequential smoke validation for init/update/show.

goals.title: Implement practical cost tracking workflow
goals.notes: Initial pricing-only implementation was not accepted because it still depended on manual or semi-manual usage entry and did not satisfy the required fully automatic cost-tracking workflow.

goals.title: Investigate fully automatic usage ingestion
goals.notes: Implemented fully automatic Codex usage ingestion from local SQLite telemetry, added sync-codex-usage backfill command, validated with 29 tests, and confirmed that current-task usage auto-populates when local response.completed events exist.

goals.title: Add retrospective and commit automatic usage sync checkpoint
goals.notes: Added a retrospective for the automatic usage sync milestone, verified 29 passing tests, and completed CLI smoke validation before creating the checkpoint commit.

goals.title: Correct overstated success metrics for rejected pricing attempt
goals.notes: Corrected the metrics history so the rejected pricing-only attempt is now recorded as fail, which restores an honest success rate and attempt-per-success summary.

goals.title: Audit metrics history for false successes and split tasks
goals.notes: Audited the current metrics history. No additional false successes were found after correcting task 007, but two process risks remain: the original cost-tracking goal is still historically split across tasks 007 and 008, and the earliest repository commits predate the metrics workflow so they do not have corresponding task records.

goals.title: Add safe task merge command for split metrics history
goals.notes: Added a safe merge-tasks command for recombining mistakenly split closed tasks, covered it with focused tests, and verified the full CLI flow with merge smoke validation.

goals.title: Run deep 5 Whys retrospective on metrics history issues
goals.notes: Completed a deep 5 Whys retrospective on overstated success and split task boundaries, recorded root causes, and proposed solution options for discussion.

goals.title: Apply retrospective outcomes for task typing and separate reporting
goals.notes: Applied retrospective outcomes by separating task types across product, retro, and meta work, updating policy and AGENTS, adding per-type reporting to the updater, and validating with tests plus CLI smoke.

goals.title: Require explicit task type for new tasks
goals.notes: Required explicit task_type for new task creation, preserved existing-task updates, updated docs, and validated the new guardrail with 35 passing tests plus CLI smoke.

goals.title: Add continuation and supersession guardrails
goals.notes: Added explicit linked-task guardrails via continuation or supersession references for newly created tasks, validated reference rules, updated reporting, and confirmed behavior with 39 passing tests plus CLI smoke.

goals.title: Migrate metrics source of truth to goals and entries
goals.notes: Migrated the metrics source of truth from task records to goals plus entries, enabled effective goal-chain summaries via supersession links, restored generated outputs, and validated the new model with 40 passing tests plus CLI smoke.

goals.title: Mark completed audit item in TODO
goals.notes: Confirmed the first TODO audit item is complete and marked it done after the metrics definitions, validation flow, task typing, and success/failure bookkeeping were corrected.

goals.title: Add entry-level summary alongside goal metrics
goals.notes: Added entry-level summary and failure-reason visibility alongside goal metrics, preserved effective goal-chain summaries, and validated the combined model with 40 passing tests plus CLI smoke.

goals.title: Write retrospective for transition to goals
goals.notes: Recorded a retrospective for the goals migration, concluded that the transition succeeded, and marked the related TODO item complete with remaining risks documented explicitly.

goals.title: Update local AGENTS rules from project history
goals.notes: Updated AGENTS with two historical guardrails: use temporary paths for destructive init smoke checks, and report both goal-level and entry-level metrics when failures exist in entries.

goals.title: Sync metrics policy with goal-era operational rules
goals.notes: Updated policy to require temp-path validation for destructive smoke checks, keep entry-level failure visibility alongside goal summaries, and align Success Rate terminology from closed_tasks to closed_goals.

goals.title: Audit metrics definitions for success rate, attempts, and failure reasons
goals.notes: Audited metric definitions end-to-end and fixed the main inconsistency: summary/report/tests now use attempts_per_closed_task (shown as Attempts per Closed Goal) instead of attempts_per_success; failure reason counting is explicitly covered by tests.

goals.title: Turn entries into a real attempt log
goals.notes: Converted entries from mirrored goal snapshots into attempt-history records, added focused attempt-log tests, kept merge and sync flows compatible, and synchronized AGENTS/policy with the new semantics.

goals.title: Audit historical goals for attempt-log backfill
goals.notes: Audited historical goals after attempt-log migration. No additional structural backfill was required: all existing goals already have entry counts matching attempts, and the earlier failed-to-successful product path remains represented through separate linked goals 2026-03-29-007 -> 2026-03-29-008.

goals.title: Add unit tests for metrics domain logic
goals.notes: Added direct unit tests for summary math, effective goal chains, entry failure aggregation, and attempt-log synchronization; full suite now passes with 46 tests.

goals.title: Add static analysis tooling for safe refactoring
goals.notes: Added pyproject-based static analysis with ruff and mypy, installed both tools into .venv, tuned initial adoption to keep signal high, and verified ruff + mypy + 46 pytest checks all pass.

goals.title: Write retrospective for testing and static analysis bootstrap
goals.notes: Added a retrospective for the testing and static-analysis bootstrap, documenting why unit tests plus ruff/mypy were added before refactoring and what adoption scope was intentionally kept narrow.

goals.title: Refactor updater application flow into smaller steps
goals.notes: Safely decomposed upsert_task into smaller internal steps for goal creation, usage resolution, update application, and final validation, while preserving CLI behavior and keeping ruff, mypy, and 46 tests green.

goals.title: Refactor goal and summary domain helpers
goals.notes: Continue safe refactoring by making summary and effective-goal logic more explicit and modular without changing persisted schema or CLI behavior.

goals.title: Introduce typed domain structures for metrics internals
goals.notes: Introduced typed internal records for attempt entries and effective goals, and switched the corresponding helper paths to use those structures without changing the persisted JSON schema or CLI behavior.

goals.title: Add typed conversion boundary for metrics records
goals.notes: Added explicit dict-to-record and record-to-dict helpers and applied them to validation and internal record creation without changing CLI or persisted schema.

goals.title: Move summary logic to typed records
goals.notes: Moved summary and effective-goal computation to typed GoalRecord, AttemptEntryRecord, and EffectiveGoalRecord inputs while keeping JSON serialization at the boundary.

goals.title: Document parallel validation false-positive retro
goals.notes: Recorded the lesson that dependent updater commands must be validated sequentially because parallel update/show can produce stale-read false positives.

goals.title: Codify sequential validation rule for updater
goals.notes: Added permanent sequential-validation rules to AGENTS.md and codex-metrics-policy.md so dependent updater commands are not validated in parallel.

goals.title: Re-audit metrics history for unresolved bugs
goals.notes: Reviewed commits, retros, and current metrics state. No new unresolved historical product bugs found beyond already documented issues around task boundaries, partial cost completeness, and stale-read validation procedure.

goals.title: Decompose attempt sync and isolate inferred failures
goals.notes: Decomposed sync_goal_attempt_entries into smaller policy helpers and excluded inferred synthetic failures from diagnostic failure-reason reporting.

goals.title: Retro for inferred failure isolation
goals.notes: Recorded the lesson that inferred attempt history is operational context, not diagnostic failure attribution, and should not pollute failure-reason metrics.

goals.title: Close high-value architectural tails
goals.notes: Closed goal_type drift by forbidding goal reclassification after attempt history exists and synced that invariant into AGENTS.md and codex-metrics-policy.md.

goals.title: Move update flow closer to typed domain boundary
goals.notes: Moved the update/application path closer to the typed domain boundary by mutating GoalRecord internally and serializing back to dict only at persistence boundaries.

goals.title: Retro for final high-ROI refactor step
goals.notes: Recorded that moving update flow to typed domain boundaries was the final high-ROI refactor before diminishing returns and that further refactoring should now be demand-driven.

goals.title: Audit code for duplication after refactor
goals.notes: Audited the updater for copy-pasted logic. No severe duplication found; remaining repetition is concentrated in report rendering, merge/sync dict mutation, and a few parallel cost/token update branches.

goals.title: Fix merge invariants and inferred entry reporting
goals.notes: Fixed merge_tasks to reject cross-type merges and supersession cycles, and marked inferred entries explicitly in the markdown report.

goals.title: Fix merge invariants and inferred entry visibility
goals.notes: Prevent invalid merge states in merge_tasks and mark inferred entries explicitly in the markdown report.

goals.title: Retro for missing merge invariant tests
goals.notes: Recorded that mutating commands need tests for happy path, invalid-state rejection, and summary/report consistency, and codified that rule in AGENTS.md and the metrics policy.

goals.title: Add real subprocess-aware coverage reporting
goals.notes: Added subprocess-aware coverage support via coverage.py and test harness env switching, then measured real updater coverage and identified the main remaining untested zones.

goals.title: Ignore local coverage artifacts and plan ROI work
goals.notes: Added local coverage artifacts to .gitignore and defined the next engineering plan around expected ROI instead of continued polishing.

goals.title: Expand high-ROI test coverage and add verify command
goals.notes: Added high-ROI tests for malformed metrics validation plus usage/pricing helpers, and introduced a canonical Makefile verify/coverage entrypoint.

goals.title: Retro for high-ROI coverage expansion
goals.notes: Documented why coverage-driven test selection had better ROI than broad test expansion, and kept verify-flow as a permanent guardrail.

goals.title: Expand pricing and usage-sync coverage
goals.notes: Expanded high-ROI coverage for pricing validation and usage-sync no-op paths, then documented make verify as the canonical local validation flow.

goals.title: Fix critical metrics invariants
goals.notes: Fixed critical invariants by auto-normalizing first closed attempt, rewriting downstream supersedes links during merge, and enforcing entry business rules without breaking inferred history entries.

goals.title: Retro for critical invariant normalization
goals.notes: Documented why invariant fixes should normalize supported workflows instead of just forbidding states, and captured the resulting permanent rules.

goals.title: Document external product audit
goals.notes: Documented the external-style project/product audit in docs/audits/ with a dedicated index for future audits.

goals.title: PM retrospective for overall metrics work
goals.notes: Captured an overall PM/client-oriented retrospective: what user problem the metrics system needed to solve, what value was actually delivered, and what product gaps remain.

goals.title: Define product framing for codex-metrics
goals.notes: Added a short product framing document covering primary user, JTBD, workflow, decisions supported, scope, and north star metric, and marked the product-vision TODO item complete.

goals.title: Refine product vision from operator goals
goals.notes: Rewrote the product framing from the user's actual goals: operator-centric, quality-first, profit-aware, and cost-constrained Codex usage, then marked the vision TODO done.

goals.title: Clarify quality metrics as working proxies
goals.notes: Clarified that current quality-related metrics are working proxies to be refined empirically rather than treated as final truth.

goals.title: Capture product-framing discovery state
goals.notes: Recorded the confirmed product-discovery context: outcome miss is the clearest quality failure, cost is a business signal, failure reasons are for debugging, and final quality/cost metrics remain intentionally open.

goals.title: Audit cost reporting product semantics
goals.notes: Audited the cost layer: total cost uses known spend, but cost per success requires complete cost chains for all successes, which makes it unavailable in most real operator views. Recommended a product change toward explicit known-cost coverage and a known-only average.

goals.title: Improve cost reporting semantics
goals.notes: Upgraded cost reporting to separate known spend from complete chain completeness by adding known-cost coverage and known-only average cost metrics alongside the stricter complete cost-per-success KPI.

goals.title: Add operator review layer
goals.notes: Added operator-facing review guidance to CLI show output and markdown report, with tests covering review heuristics and report rendering.

goals.title: Retrospective on operator review layer
goals.notes: Captured why the new operator-facing review layer was needed, what value it adds, and why interpretation now has higher ROI than more raw metrics.

goals.title: Repeat code review and close TODO
goals.notes: Repeated high-ROI code review, added supersession-cycle guardrails for merge and load validation, expanded regression coverage, and closed the TODO review item.

goals.title: Make complete cost reporting actionable
goals.notes: Replaced brittle complete-cost display with complete coverage and covered-success averages, clarified the operator review wording, and closed the TODO item about always-null complete cost reporting.

goals.title: Deep overall retrospective and AGENTS update
goals.notes: Added one deep overall retrospective using 5 Whys and Theory of Constraints, updated AGENTS.md with durable product-alignment rules, and closed the TODO item for the overall retro and local AGENTS update.

goals.title: Clean up AGENTS operational guidance
goals.notes: Tightened AGENTS.md wording, reduced duplication, and kept the file focused on durable operating rules rather than history.

goals.title: Add minimal public-facing README skeleton
goals.notes: Added README.md with minimal public-facing project description, quick start, validated CLI commands, and local verification entrypoints.

goals.title: Minimize and generalize Codex Metrics Policy
goals.notes: Rewrote the metrics policy into a shorter reusable version, removed bloated local detail, preserved core invariants, and closed the TODO item for policy minimization.

goals.title: Improve CLI usability help and examples
goals.notes: Improved argparse help text, examples, and command descriptions without changing CLI behavior, then closed the usability TODO item.

goals.title: Auto-generate goal IDs and lock metrics mutations
goals.notes: Added internal goal ID generation for new tasks, made --task-id optional for creation, protected mutating commands with an exclusive metrics lock, switched report/metrics writes to atomic replace, and added regression coverage for auto-id and parallel creation.

goals.title: Retrospective for concurrent goal-id collision fix
goals.notes: Added retrospective documenting the concurrent goal-id collision bug, its source-of-truth boundary failure, and the permanent fixes: internal id generation, mutation locking, atomic writes, and regression coverage.

goals.title: Close TODO item for script-generated goal IDs
goals.notes: Closed the TODO item for script-generated IDs after the updater began allocating goal IDs internally and guarding mutations with a lock.

goals.title: Align README with goal-based model
goals.notes: Aligned README terminology with the current goal-based model and clarified that goal-level outcome summary should be read together with entry-level retry history.

goals.title: Package codex-metrics as installable public CLI
goals.notes: Packaged codex-metrics as an installable src-layout CLI with a console script entrypoint, bundled pricing data, a compatibility shim under scripts/, packaging docs, a GitHub build workflow, and validated wheel installation in a clean venv.

goals.title: Retrospective for installable CLI packaging milestone
goals.notes: Added retrospective for the installable CLI packaging milestone, documenting the shift from repo-local script assumptions to package-first runtime, package data handling, compatibility shims, and release validation.

goals.title: Prefer auto-generated goal IDs by default
goals.notes: Improve manual goal ID conflict messaging and document auto-ID as the default path for new goals.

goals.title: Clarify manual goal id conflicts
goals.notes: Clarified auto-id default path and manual id conflict guidance

goals.title: Close packaging TODO and split follow-up release tasks
goals.notes: Closed the broad packaging TODO now that installable build artifacts, package docs, and CI packaging flow exist; added narrower follow-up tasks for GitHub Release automation, PyPI publish path, and standalone binary evaluation.

goals.title: Write retro for manual goal id conflict UX
goals.notes: Captured manual goal id conflict UX retro and permanent workflow guidance

goals.title: Refresh external product audit
goals.notes: Recorded a refreshed external-style audit covering the packaged CLI state, product maturity shift, remaining weaknesses, and updated recommendations in docs/audits/.

goals.title: Engineering audit for ROI, bugs, and coverage
goals.notes: Completed an engineering-lead audit of the packaged CLI: verified green lint/typecheck/tests, measured coverage, identified high-ROI refactoring seams, and found no critical runtime bugs in the current review pass.

goals.title: Fix coverage reporting accuracy
goals.notes: Fixed coverage reporting to follow the configured codex_metrics source set instead of manually including the compatibility shim; re-ran verify and coverage successfully.

goals.title: Increase entrypoint coverage
goals.notes: Improved coverage with a packaged-module init smoke test and subprocess coverage for python -m codex_metrics using the canonical src path; coverage report remains clean and stable.

goals.title: Add small high-value edge coverage
goals.notes: Added focused domain coverage for malformed goal-id filtering and non-positive numeric deltas; coverage now reaches 90% total with 90% on the main CLI module.

goals.title: Extract reporting layer from CLI
goals.notes: Extracted the reporting/presentation layer into src/codex_metrics/reporting.py, kept CLI behavior unchanged via imports/re-exports, and verified the refactor with green lint, mypy, tests, and coverage.

goals.title: Extract command handlers from CLI main
goals.notes: Extracted command handlers into src/codex_metrics/commands.py with a typed Protocol boundary and lazy import from cli.main; verify and coverage remained green after the refactor.

goals.title: Extract storage and mutation boundary
goals.notes: Extracted storage and mutation helpers into src/codex_metrics/storage.py, kept CLI behavior unchanged via imports and re-exports, and verified the refactor with green lint, mypy, tests, and coverage.

goals.title: Extract domain helpers from CLI
goals.notes: Extracted record models, validation, summary computation, and attempt-sync helpers into src/codex_metrics/domain.py while preserving the existing CLI surface via imports and re-exports; verify and coverage remained green after restoring datetime/timezone compatibility for the shim-exported module surface.

goals.title: Increase domain edge-case coverage
goals.notes: Added focused domain tests for validation failures, unknown supersession references, attempt-history trimming and fallback paths, goal-type guardrails, and create/update/finalize edge cases; domain coverage rose to 90% and total coverage to 91% with full verify green.

goals.title: Write retro for domain coverage and layered refactor
goals.notes: Logged the retrospective for the layered CLI decomposition and the follow-up domain coverage pass in docs/retros, then reran the repository verify flow successfully.

goals.title: Add compatibility rule from refactor retro to AGENTS
goals.notes: Added compatibility and validation guardrails from the layered refactor retro to AGENTS.md, then reran the repository verify flow successfully.

goals.title: Integrate history audit command cleanly
goals.notes: Integrated history audit as a first-class command, extended verify coverage, and kept the implementation modular.

goals.title: Retro for history audit command integration
goals.notes: Documented the history audit command checkpoint, modular integration path, and verification changes.

goals.title: Add result fit quality layer
goals.notes: Added the result_fit quality layer, exposed it through the CLI and report, and backfilled the clearest historical quality outcomes.

goals.title: Retro for result-fit quality layer
goals.notes: Documented why result_fit was added, why status was preserved, and why backfill remained curated.

goals.title: Backfill reviewed result fit for remaining clear audit candidate
goals.notes: Backfilled reviewed result_fit for the last clear manual audit candidate and confirmed the quality audit now only surfaces stale goals and low cost coverage.

goals.title: Add cost coverage audit command
goals.notes: Added audit-cost-coverage command with reason buckets and tests.

goals.title: Record cost coverage audit retrospective
goals.notes: Logged the cost coverage audit retro and documented the new bottleneck in cost capture/recovery.

goals.title: Add session telemetry fallback for usage recovery
goals.notes: Added session token_count fallback for Codex usage recovery, verified with tests, and backfilled historical usage via sync-codex-usage.

goals.title: Add live usage recovery smoke check
goals.notes: Added an opt-in live E2E smoke that creates temporary metrics files, runs updater end-to-end against real local Codex telemetry, and verifies recovered tokens and cost match the selected rollout event exactly.

goals.title: Expand usage recovery fallback test coverage
goals.notes: Added hardening tests for multi-event session sums, window filtering, tokens-only fallback, and legacy-path precedence over session recovery.

goals.title: Record usage recovery format mismatch retrospective
goals.notes: Logged a deep retro with 5 Whys for the session-based usage recovery investigation and the legacy-format extractor mismatch.

goals.title: Record usage recovery format mismatch retrospective
goals.notes: Captured the telemetry format mismatch root cause with 5 Whys and Theory of Constraints after adding session telemetry fallback and validating live usage recovery.

goals.title: Backfill exact-fit reviews for historical product goals
goals.notes: Reviewed unannotated one-attempt product goals and backfilled exact_fit only where confidence was high: no supersede chain, no fail history, accepted outcome notes, and single-attempt closure.

goals.title: Clarify zero-duration cost audit windows
goals.notes: Reclassified zero-duration product goal windows from no_usage_data_found to incomplete_goal_window so cost audit points at too-narrow recorded boundaries instead of blaming telemetry absence.

goals.title: Guard against zero-duration product goal windows
goals.notes: Added a finalize-path guardrail that normalizes zero-duration closed product goals without stored cost/tokens into a one-second recovery window, plus regression tests for normalization and explicit-token exemptions.

goals.title: Record zero-duration product window retrospective
goals.notes: Captured the zero-duration product window incident with 5 Whys and Theory of Constraints after shifting from strict rejection to finalize-path normalization for cost recovery windows.

goals.title: Add bootstrap/init command for project integration
goals.notes: Added bootstrap command that scaffolds metrics/report files, exports a codex-metrics policy, and manages an AGENTS.md block with dry-run and force safeguards. Verified with make verify and a clean temp-directory bootstrap smoke test.

goals.title: Fix bootstrap partial-scaffold safety and error UX
goals.notes: Refactored bootstrap into a preflight/apply flow so conflicts are detected before writes, partial existing scaffold is completed safely, and report regeneration is explicit when metrics are recreated. Also normalized ValueError handling on script and module entrypoints, then verified with make verify and targeted QA temp-directory scenarios.

goals.title: Fix installed console entrypoint error UX
goals.notes: Added a canonical console_main wrapper so the installed codex-metrics console script, python -m entrypoint, and script shim all share the same friendly ValueError handling. Updated project.scripts to point at the wrapped entrypoint, added regression coverage, and reran make verify.

goals.title: Write bootstrap QA hardening retrospective
goals.notes: Recorded a retrospective for the bootstrap QA hardening pass, covering partial scaffold failures, non-destructive conflict handling, and the need to route the installed console script through a canonical wrapped entrypoint.

goals.title: Codify bootstrap initializer guardrails in repo rules
goals.notes: Codified bootstrap initializer guardrails in AGENTS.md and codex-metrics-policy.md: preflight-before-write, safe reruns, partial scaffold support, non-destructive conflict handling, and validation through real installed entrypoints. Verified with make verify.

goals.title: Keep bootstrap guardrails local to AGENTS
goals.notes: Kept the bootstrap initializer guardrails only in local AGENTS.md and removed them from the reusable external policy file, then reran make verify to confirm the scope correction stayed clean.

goals.title: Write retro about retro-output classification failure
goals.notes: Recorded a retrospective about retro-output classification failure and codified a local AGENTS.md rule requiring explicit scope classification for retrospective follow-up actions before they are promoted into rules, policy, tests, or left as incident history. Verified with make verify.

goals.title: Write meta-retro for external policy overreach
goals.notes: Recorded a focused incident retrospective for the external policy overreach mistake: a local bootstrap lesson was incorrectly promoted into the reusable policy layer. The permanent rule is to treat external policy changes as opt-in and require explicit reusability justification before promoting a lesson out of local rules or tests.

goals.title: Add new-project bootstrap instructions to README
goals.notes: Added a README section with copy-paste instructions for installing codex-metrics into another repository, previewing bootstrap with --dry-run, applying the scaffold, and running the first goal workflow. Verified with make verify.

goals.title: Unify package version metadata
goals.notes: Switched package metadata to a single source of truth for versioning by making pyproject read codex_metrics.__version__. This keeps future updates to one version location instead of duplicated metadata. Verified with make verify.

goals.title: Add upgrade instructions for downstream repositories
goals.notes: Added README instructions for updating codex-metrics in an already bootstrapped downstream repository: upgrade the installed package, preview scaffold reconciliation with bootstrap --dry-run, apply bootstrap, and run show. Verified with make verify.

goals.title: Make install instructions platform-safe
goals.notes: Updated README install and upgrade instructions to use pipx as the preferred standalone CLI path and python3/py as platform-specific fallbacks instead of assuming a bare python executable. Verified with make verify.

goals.title: Add standalone distribution artifact
goals.notes: Added a practical standalone binary build path with PyInstaller one-file packaging, a local make target, CI matrix builds for macOS/Linux/Windows, and README guidance. Also made default pricing data loading freeze-friendly and locally verified the macOS binary with package-standalone plus standalone --help and bootstrap/show smoke checks.

goals.title: Build standalone codex-metrics binaries for macOS, Linux, and Windows
goals.notes: Built standalone codex-metrics binaries via PyInstaller one-file packaging, added package-standalone target, added macOS/Linux/Windows CI matrix artifacts, updated README for standalone install/update flow, and validated with make verify, make package-standalone, local macOS standalone --help, and bootstrap/show smoke checks.

goals.title: Standalone binaries retrospective
goals.notes: Added standalone binaries retrospective covering frozen-resource handling, PyInstaller local build friction, CI matrix artifact generation, standalone smoke checks, and downstream install/update guidance.

goals.title: Clarify init vs bootstrap CLI help text
goals.notes: Clarified CLI help text so init is described as metrics/report-only initialization and bootstrap is described as full repository scaffold integration with AGENTS.md and policy; verified with source-tree help output and make verify.

goals.title: Clarify standalone binary invocation docs
goals.notes: Clarified README for standalone self-host usage: direct binaries must be invoked by path unless moved onto PATH, updated bootstrap and upgrade examples to use /path/to/codex-metrics, and added troubleshooting for zsh command-not-found; verified with make verify.

goals.title: Add shell completion support for codex-metrics
goals.notes: Added built-in shell completion support via codex-metrics completion bash|zsh, covered it with automated tests, and updated README with activation instructions for PATH-installed and standalone-by-path usage; verified with make verify.

goals.title: Shell completion and standalone invocation retrospective
goals.notes: Added retrospective for shell completion and standalone self-host UX, covering PATH assumptions, missing autocomplete, corrected README guidance, and built-in completion support as a permanent CLI surface.

goals.title: Strengthen bootstrap installer agent instructions
goals.notes: Strengthened bootstrap installer output so the managed AGENTS.md block explains PATH-installed versus standalone-by-path invocation, the required Codex agent workflow, and retry/close/show commands; also updated the exported policy template with standalone path guidance and added bootstrap regression coverage; verified with targeted bootstrap tests and make verify.

goals.title: Document canonical symlink install path for standalone codex-metrics
goals.notes: Documented canonical standalone self-host install path via ~/bin/codex-metrics symlink in bootstrap-generated AGENTS guidance, exported policy template, and README rollout instructions; added regression assertions and verified with targeted bootstrap tests plus make verify.

goals.title: Add self-install command for standalone binary
goals.notes: Finalized install-self: it now installs a working launcher, warns when the target directory is not on PATH, prints the exact export PATH line for the current shell profile, and is covered by regression tests plus full verify.

goals.title: Rebuild standalone binary after install-self addition
goals.notes: Rebuilt the standalone binary after adding install-self, verified that dist/standalone/codex-metrics now exposes install-self in top-level help and install-self --help, and confirmed the earlier invalid-choice error came from an outdated standalone artifact built before the new command existed.

goals.title: Add optional shell profile update to install-self
goals.notes: Added opt-in shell profile update support to install-self via --write-shell-profile, so installer can append the target directory to ~/.zshrc or ~/.bashrc when it is not already on PATH; kept default behavior non-destructive, added regression tests for profile writing and idempotency, updated README, and verified with targeted tests plus make verify.

goals.title: Installer hardening retrospective
goals.notes: Added installer hardening retrospective covering stale standalone artifacts, PATH discoverability, launcher correctness, and the opt-in shell-profile update model for install-self.

goals.title: Move codex-metrics usage contract from AGENTS block into policy template
goals.notes: Refined the bootstrap-generated AGENTS block to an explicit Read first include pointing to AGENTS.md and docs/codex-metrics-policy.md with mandatory-policy wording; verified with bootstrap-focused tests and full make verify.

goals.title: Clarify codex-metrics policy for newly bootstrapped agents
goals.notes: Clarified the exported codex-metrics policy for newly bootstrapped agents by adding What This Is, When It Applies, Key Terms, First Task Checklist, and an explicit retry command example; verified with bootstrap-focused tests and full make verify.

goals.title: Remove generated-artifact usage rules from AGENTS include block
goals.notes: Removed generated-artifact references and manual-edit rules from the bootstrap-generated AGENTS include block so it now only points agents to AGENTS.md and the codex-metrics policy; kept the operational details in the exported policy template; verified with bootstrap-focused tests and full make verify.

goals.title: AGENTS vs policy boundary retrospective
goals.notes: Added retrospective for the AGENTS vs policy boundary drift in bootstrap-generated instructions, documenting why AGENTS should remain a read-first include while the policy owns the codex-metrics operational contract.

goals.title: Add make target for rebuild and global self-install
goals.notes: Added make package-refresh-global to rebuild sdist, wheel, and standalone binary, then run install-self for a global refresh; documented INSTALL_SELF_ARGS override and verified with make verify plus end-to-end make package-refresh-global INSTALL_SELF_ARGS=--target-dir /tmp/codex-metrics-bin.

goals.title: Deduplicate local AGENTS against reusable codex-metrics policy
goals.notes: Deduplicated local AGENTS against reusable codex-metrics policy: reduced AGENTS to repo-local tooling and process guardrails, moved reusable reporting/workflow semantics into policy, and verified with make verify.

goals.title: Unify duplicate codex-metrics policy sources
goals.notes: Unified bootstrap and repo policy text under one canonical content and added a regression test to prevent drift.

goals.title: Retrospective for duplicated metrics policy sources
goals.notes: Recorded the duplicate-policy-source incident and codified the runtime-package plus synchronized-mirror approach.

goals.title: Slim codex-metrics policy to a minimal agent-facing contract
goals.notes: Reduced the policy to a compact agent-facing contract, kept the essential workflow and validation rules, and removed spec-like detail.

goals.title: Add high-level start-task, continue-task, and finish-task commands
goals.notes: Added start-task, continue-task, and finish-task commands as high-level wrappers around update, with tests and docs.

goals.title: Draft stage-based task lifecycle pilot
goals.notes: Added a lightweight lifecycle pilot doc with lead-owned stage transitions, stage definitions, operating rules, and criteria for when to automate stage support in the tool.

goals.title: Document high-level task commands in policy
goals.notes: Added recommended start-task, continue-task, and finish-task flow to the agent-facing policy and kept the packaged mirror in sync.

goals.title: Retrospective for high-level task commands documentation gap
goals.notes: Recorded the gap where new workflow commands were documented in README but not in the agent-facing policy, and codified the recommended command flow there.

goals.title: Add local AGENTS rule for policy updates on workflow changes
goals.notes: Added a local AGENTS rule that workflow-shaping CLI changes must update the agent-facing policy and packaged policy mirror.

goals.title: Draft reusable AI instructions for new Python projects
goals.notes: Added a reusable instruction file that distills the highest-ROI practices from codex-metrics history for faster Python project development: diagnosis-first, guardrails, verification, typed boundaries, strong testing, and honest workflow boundaries.

goals.title: Strengthen reusable AI instructions for Python projects
goals.notes: Tightened the reusable instruction file to require test-first development, coverage from project start, mandatory lint/type analysis, active anti-copy-paste discipline, and explicit SOLID/DDD/GRASP architectural guidance.

goals.title: Broaden reusable Python project AI instructions
goals.notes: Expanded the reusable instruction file with canonical verify-flow, layered architecture defaults, compatibility-contract thinking, audit-first metric diagnosis, bootstrap safety, and retrospective scope discipline based on codex-metrics lessons.

goals.title: Remove IDE project files from git
goals.notes: Removed tracked .idea files from git index while keeping them locally ignored via .gitignore so IDE noise stops polluting repository history.

goals.title: Add concise AGENTS template for new Python projects
goals.notes: Added a mandatory-rules-only AGENTS template for new Python projects with strict guidance on TDD, coverage, linting, type checking, anti-copy-paste discipline, layered architecture, validation, and definition of done.

goals.title: Consolidate reusable Python project instructions
goals.notes: Collapsed the reusable guidance down to a single concise AGENTS template and strengthened it with explicit strict-typing rules: strict or near-strict mypy, avoid Any without a clear boundary reason, and avoid raw untyped dicts in domain logic.

goals.title: Strengthen architecture rules in Python project template
goals.notes: Expanded the reusable AGENTS template with stricter architecture rules: pure domain boundaries, explicit application layer, invariant ownership, composition over inheritance, and explicit dependencies over hidden shared state.

goals.title: Add retrospective logging block to Python template
goals.notes: Added a dedicated retrospective logging block to the reusable Python project AGENTS template so meaningful bugs, false successes, and process misses are captured with a classified follow-up instead of disappearing into chat history.

goals.title: Add reusable process playbook for new projects
goals.notes: Added a reusable process playbook covering PM discovery, lead-owned task creation, role separation, stage flow, and the rule that development should start from a clarified task rather than a raw request.

goals.title: Align retrospective rules in local and reusable AGENTS
goals.notes: Strengthened local and reusable retrospective rules with explicit minimum sections, scope classification, and a recommendation to use 5 Whys and Theory of Constraints for significant incidents.

goals.title: Harden invocation contract for codex-metrics agents
goals.notes: Added an explicit no-guessing invocation contract to local AGENTS and the reusable policy, and kept the packaged policy mirror in sync.

goals.title: Move invocation contract from local AGENTS to bootstrap output
goals.notes: Moved the invocation contract out of local AGENTS and into the bootstrap-generated AGENTS block, with regression coverage.

goals.title: Create repo-local codex-metrics wrapper during bootstrap
goals.notes: Bootstrap now creates a repo-local tools/codex-metrics wrapper, and the generated AGENTS block points agents at that exact path.

goals.title: Warn when active virtualenv shadows global codex-metrics install
goals.notes: install-self now warns when an active virtualenv shadows the global codex-metrics command, with regression coverage.

goals.title: Refresh local venv codex-metrics install in make flow
goals.notes: Added package-refresh-local and made package-refresh-global refresh the local .venv install before reinstalling the standalone binary globally.

goals.title: Retrospective for stale local venv codex-metrics install
goals.notes: Recorded the failed local refresh path where standalone/global installs were updated but the active .venv install remained stale, and documented the permanent fix.

goals.title: Add local rule for local CLI surface verification
goals.notes: Added a local validation rule to treat source-tree, .venv, and standalone/global installs as separate runnable surfaces and to verify the actual executable path when behavior looks stale.

goals.title: Record TODO for retrospective metrics audit
goals.notes: Added TODO items for retrospective-time metrics quality audit and optional automatic task-metrics snapshots in retrospectives.

goals.title: Guard cross-project metrics analysis as read-only
goals.notes: Rule added to AGENTS: treat other repositories' metrics as read-only analysis inputs unless explicit modification is requested.

goals.title: Add explicit CLI version output
goals.notes: Added top-level --version support to the CLI parser and covered script/module entrypoints in tests; make verify passed.

goals.title: Align local CLI install surfaces
goals.notes: Added make dev-refresh-local using offline editable install, documented editable local refresh versus wheel refresh, reinstalled the local .venv package editable, and verified that source-tree, .venv/bin/codex-metrics, and python -m codex_metrics all report the same version.

goals.title: Bump package version to 0.2.0
goals.notes: Bumped the package version from 0.1.0 to 0.2.0, refreshed the editable local install so .venv/bin/codex-metrics reports the same version, replaced hardcoded wheel-version examples in README with placeholders, and made version tests follow PACKAGE_VERSION.

goals.title: Derive CLI version from git state
goals.notes: Version output is now git-derived in working repos, base-versioned in source snapshots without git, and metadata-backed in installed surfaces. Added unit coverage for git-first and metadata/source-layout fallback behavior, verified make verify, and confirmed make dev-refresh-local updates both .venv/bin/codex-metrics and python -m codex_metrics to the same auto-derived version string.

goals.title: Retrospective on automatic CLI versioning
goals.notes: Logged a full retrospective for the CLI version drift incident: missing manual bump discipline, stale local install surfaces, the move to editable local refresh, and automatic git-derived version identity with explicit fallback rules.

goals.title: Bootstrap self repo wrapper
goals.notes: Bootstrapped the codex-metrics repo itself so it now has the same repo-local tools/codex-metrics wrapper flow as downstream projects. Verified the wrapper exists, reports the current version, and runs show successfully.

goals.title: Align AGENTS with repo-local wrapper
goals.notes: Updated AGENTS.md so the codex-metrics repo now documents ./tools/codex-metrics as the canonical command path, with scripts/update_codex_metrics.py demoted to compatibility fallback. Verified the wrapper path with ./tools/codex-metrics show.

goals.title: Remove outdated script-first note from AGENTS
goals.notes: Removed the outdated script-first command example from AGENTS.md so local instructions now point only to ./tools/codex-metrics as the user-facing workflow. Verified the wrapper path with ./tools/codex-metrics show.

goals.title: Fix repo-local wrapper cwd semantics
goals.notes: Updated bootstrap-generated wrapper semantics so tools/codex-metrics cds into its own repository root before exec. Added regression coverage for invocation from another working directory, verified make verify, updated the current repo wrapper, and confirmed /tmp path invocation still reads this repo's metrics.

goals.title: Store external metrics snapshot for audit context
goals.notes: Added a read-only external metrics snapshot directory under docs/audits and stored the current invest codex_metrics.json there with a README explaining that these files are point-in-time external raw data for analysis, not mutable project state.

goals.title: Store hhsave metrics snapshot for analysis
goals.notes: Copy the current hhsave codex_metrics.json into the read-only external metrics snapshots directory so cross-project product analysis can compare another real repository without mutating its live files.

goals.title: Store hhsave external metrics snapshot
goals.notes: Added docs/audits/external-metrics-snapshots/hhsave-codex_metrics-2026-03-31.json as a read-only external snapshot for cross-project product analysis. Verified the snapshot directory contents and regenerated metrics/report through the CLI workflow.

goals.title: Formalize PM hypothesis tracking workflow
goals.notes: Added docs/product-hypotheses.md as the local product and metrics hypothesis log, updated AGENTS.md to require hypothesis-driven PM framing and re-evaluation, and clarified in docs/product-framing.md that unconfirmed product ideas stay in the hypothesis log until validated.

goals.title: Add PM hypothesis workflow retrospective
goals.notes: Logged a dedicated retrospective for the shift to hypothesis-driven PM, and extended docs/product-hypotheses.md with process hypotheses about lead-mediated task flow, early PM discovery, and codified retrospective follow-up.

entries.notes: Added negative cost/token validation with tests; validated with init/show; pytest passed after installing pytest into .venv.
Added first retrospective, verified 10 passing tests, and completed serialized smoke flow for init/update/show before creating a checkpoint commit.
Added repository .gitignore for caches, local virtualenvs, IDE settings, and OS noise; verified required metrics/report/retro files are not ignored.

Expanded tests to cover missing stateful CLI behavior: required title on create, updating existing tasks without title, explicit timestamps, negative attempts, and report ordering; 15 tests passed and smoke flow validated.

Added strict task-record validation, status/failure_reason and timestamp business rules, safe init with --force, concise CLI error messages, 22 passing tests, and sequential smoke validation for init/update/show.
Initial pricing-only implementation was not accepted because it still depended on manual or semi-manual usage entry and did not satisfy the required fully automatic cost-tracking workflow.

Implemented fully automatic Codex usage ingestion from local SQLite telemetry, added sync-codex-usage backfill command, validated with 29 tests, and confirmed that current-task usage auto-populates when local response.completed events exist.
Added a retrospective for the automatic usage sync milestone, verified 29 passing tests, and completed CLI smoke validation before creating the checkpoint commit.
Corrected the metrics history so the rejected pricing-only attempt is now recorded as fail, which restores an honest success rate and attempt-per-success summary.

Audited the current metrics history. No additional false successes were found after correcting task 007, but two process risks remain: the original cost-tracking goal is still historically split across tasks 007 and 008, and the earliest repository commits predate the metrics workflow so they do not have corresponding task records.
Added a safe merge-tasks command for recombining mistakenly split closed tasks, covered it with focused tests, and verified the full CLI flow with merge smoke validation.
Completed a deep 5 Whys retrospective on overstated success and split task boundaries, recorded root causes, and proposed solution options for discussion.

Applied retrospective outcomes by separating task types across product, retro, and meta work, updating policy and AGENTS, adding per-type reporting to the updater, and validating with tests plus CLI smoke.
Required explicit task_type for new task creation, preserved existing-task updates, updated docs, and validated the new guardrail with 35 passing tests plus CLI smoke.

Added explicit linked-task guardrails via continuation or supersession references for newly created tasks, validated reference rules, updated reporting, and confirmed behavior with 39 passing tests plus CLI smoke.

Migrated the metrics source of truth from task records to goals plus entries, enabled effective goal-chain summaries via supersession links, restored generated outputs, and validated the new model with 40 passing tests plus CLI smoke.
Confirmed the first TODO audit item is complete and marked it done after the metrics definitions, validation flow, task typing, and success/failure bookkeeping were corrected.
Added entry-level summary and failure-reason visibility alongside goal metrics, preserved effective goal-chain summaries, and validated the combined model with 40 passing tests plus CLI smoke.
Recorded a retrospective for the goals migration, concluded that the transition succeeded, and marked the related TODO item complete with remaining risks documented explicitly.
Updated AGENTS with two historical guardrails: use temporary paths for destructive init smoke checks, and report both goal-level and entry-level metrics when failures exist in entries.

Updated policy to require temp-path validation for destructive smoke checks, keep entry-level failure visibility alongside goal summaries, and align Success Rate terminology from closed_tasks to closed_goals.

Audited metric definitions end-to-end and fixed the main inconsistency: summary/report/tests now use attempts_per_closed_task (shown as Attempts per Closed Goal) instead of attempts_per_success; failure reason counting is explicitly covered by tests.

Converted entries from mirrored goal snapshots into attempt-history records, added focused attempt-log tests, kept merge and sync flows compatible, and synchronized AGENTS/policy with the new semantics.

Audited historical goals after attempt-log migration. No additional structural backfill was required: all existing goals already have entry counts matching attempts, and the earlier failed-to-successful product path remains represented through separate linked goals 2026-03-29-007 -> 2026-03-29-008.
Added direct unit tests for summary math, effective goal chains, entry failure aggregation, and attempt-log synchronization; full suite now passes with 46 tests.
Added pyproject-based static analysis with ruff and mypy, installed both tools into .venv, tuned initial adoption to keep signal high, and verified ruff + mypy + 46 pytest checks all pass.
Added a retrospective for the testing and static-analysis bootstrap, documenting why unit tests plus ruff/mypy were added before refactoring and what adoption scope was intentionally kept narrow.

Safely decomposed upsert_task into smaller internal steps for goal creation, usage resolution, update application, and final validation, while preserving CLI behavior and keeping ruff, mypy, and 46 tests green.
Continue safe refactoring by making summary and effective-goal logic more explicit and modular without changing persisted schema or CLI behavior.

Introduced typed internal records for attempt entries and effective goals, and switched the corresponding helper paths to use those structures without changing the persisted JSON schema or CLI behavior.
Added explicit dict-to-record and record-to-dict helpers and applied them to validation and internal record creation without changing CLI or persisted schema.
Moved summary and effective-goal computation to typed GoalRecord, AttemptEntryRecord, and EffectiveGoalRecord inputs while keeping JSON serialization at the boundary.
Recorded the lesson that dependent updater commands must be validated sequentially because parallel update/show can produce stale-read false positives.
Added permanent sequential-validation rules to AGENTS.md and codex-metrics-policy.md so dependent updater commands are not validated in parallel.

Reviewed commits, retros, and current metrics state. No new unresolved historical product bugs found beyond already documented issues around task boundaries, partial cost completeness, and stale-read validation procedure.
Decomposed sync_goal_attempt_entries into smaller policy helpers and excluded inferred synthetic failures from diagnostic failure-reason reporting.
Recorded the lesson that inferred attempt history is operational context, not diagnostic failure attribution, and should not pollute failure-reason metrics.
Closed goal_type drift by forbidding goal reclassification after attempt history exists and synced that invariant into AGENTS.md and codex-metrics-policy.md.
Moved the update/application path closer to the typed domain boundary by mutating GoalRecord internally and serializing back to dict only at persistence boundaries.
Recorded that moving update flow to typed domain boundaries was the final high-ROI refactor before diminishing returns and that further refactoring should now be demand-driven.

Audited the updater for copy-pasted logic. No severe duplication found; remaining repetition is concentrated in report rendering, merge/sync dict mutation, and a few parallel cost/token update branches.
Fixed merge_tasks to reject cross-type merges and supersession cycles, and marked inferred entries explicitly in the markdown report.
Prevent invalid merge states in merge_tasks and mark inferred entries explicitly in the markdown report.
Recorded that mutating commands need tests for happy path, invalid-state rejection, and summary/report consistency, and codified that rule in AGENTS.md and the metrics policy.
Added subprocess-aware coverage support via coverage.py and test harness env switching, then measured real updater coverage and identified the main remaining untested zones.
Added local coverage artifacts to .gitignore and defined the next engineering plan around expected ROI instead of continued polishing.
Added high-ROI tests for malformed metrics validation plus usage/pricing helpers, and introduced a canonical Makefile verify/coverage entrypoint.
Documented why coverage-driven test selection had better ROI than broad test expansion, and kept verify-flow as a permanent guardrail.
Expanded high-ROI coverage for pricing validation and usage-sync no-op paths, then documented make verify as the canonical local validation flow.
Fixed critical invariants by auto-normalizing first closed attempt, rewriting downstream supersedes links during merge, and enforcing entry business rules without breaking inferred history entries.
Documented why invariant fixes should normalize supported workflows instead of just forbidding states, and captured the resulting permanent rules.
Documented the external-style project/product audit in docs/audits/ with a dedicated index for future audits.
Captured an overall PM/client-oriented retrospective: what user problem the metrics system needed to solve, what value was actually delivered, and what product gaps remain.
Added a short product framing document covering primary user, JTBD, workflow, decisions supported, scope, and north star metric, and marked the product-vision TODO item complete.
Rewrote the product framing from the user's actual goals: operator-centric, quality-first, profit-aware, and cost-constrained Codex usage, then marked the vision TODO done.
Clarified that current quality-related metrics are working proxies to be refined empirically rather than treated as final truth.

Recorded the confirmed product-discovery context: outcome miss is the clearest quality failure, cost is a business signal, failure reasons are for debugging, and final quality/cost metrics remain intentionally open.

Audited the cost layer: total cost uses known spend, but cost per success requires complete cost chains for all successes, which makes it unavailable in most real operator views. Recommended a product change toward explicit known-cost coverage and a known-only average.

Upgraded cost reporting to separate known spend from complete chain completeness by adding known-cost coverage and known-only average cost metrics alongside the stricter complete cost-per-success KPI.
Added operator-facing review guidance to CLI show output and markdown report, with tests covering review heuristics and report rendering.
Captured why the new operator-facing review layer was needed, what value it adds, and why interpretation now has higher ROI than more raw metrics.
Repeated high-ROI code review, added supersession-cycle guardrails for merge and load validation, expanded regression coverage, and closed the TODO review item.
Replaced brittle complete-cost display with complete coverage and covered-success averages, clarified the operator review wording, and closed the TODO item about always-null complete cost reporting.

Added one deep overall retrospective using 5 Whys and Theory of Constraints, updated AGENTS.md with durable product-alignment rules, and closed the TODO item for the overall retro and local AGENTS update.
Tightened AGENTS.md wording, reduced duplication, and kept the file focused on durable operating rules rather than history.
Added README.md with minimal public-facing project description, quick start, validated CLI commands, and local verification entrypoints.
Rewrote the metrics policy into a shorter reusable version, removed bloated local detail, preserved core invariants, and closed the TODO item for policy minimization.
Removed unused PyCharm bootstrap main.py after confirming it had no repo references or runtime role; validation stayed green.

Added internal goal ID generation for new tasks, made --task-id optional for creation, protected mutating commands with an exclusive metrics lock, switched report/metrics writes to atomic replace, and added regression coverage for auto-id and parallel creation.
Improve argparse help text and examples so the tool is easier to adopt and reuse without changing CLI behavior.

Added retrospective documenting the concurrent goal-id collision bug, its source-of-truth boundary failure, and the permanent fixes: internal id generation, mutation locking, atomic writes, and regression coverage.
Improved argparse help text, examples, and command descriptions without changing CLI behavior, then closed the usability TODO item.
Closed the TODO item for script-generated IDs after the updater began allocating goal IDs internally and guarding mutations with a lock.
Aligned README terminology with the current goal-based model and clarified that goal-level outcome summary should be read together with entry-level retry history.

Packaged codex-metrics as an installable src-layout CLI with a console script entrypoint, bundled pricing data, a compatibility shim under scripts/, packaging docs, a GitHub build workflow, and validated wheel installation in a clean venv.

Added retrospective for the installable CLI packaging milestone, documenting the shift from repo-local script assumptions to package-first runtime, package data handling, compatibility shims, and release validation.
Improve manual goal ID conflict messaging and document auto-ID as the default path for new goals.
Clarified auto-id default path and manual id conflict guidance

Closed the broad packaging TODO now that installable build artifacts, package docs, and CI packaging flow exist; added narrower follow-up tasks for GitHub Release automation, PyPI publish path, and standalone binary evaluation.
Captured manual goal id conflict UX retro and permanent workflow guidance
Recorded a refreshed external-style audit covering the packaged CLI state, product maturity shift, remaining weaknesses, and updated recommendations in docs/audits/.

Completed an engineering-lead audit of the packaged CLI: verified green lint/typecheck/tests, measured coverage, identified high-ROI refactoring seams, and found no critical runtime bugs in the current review pass.
Fixed coverage reporting to follow the configured codex_metrics source set instead of manually including the compatibility shim; re-ran verify and coverage successfully.
Improved coverage with a packaged-module init smoke test and subprocess coverage for python -m codex_metrics using the canonical src path; coverage report remains clean and stable.
Added focused domain coverage for malformed goal-id filtering and non-positive numeric deltas; coverage now reaches 90% total with 90% on the main CLI module.

Extracted the reporting/presentation layer into src/codex_metrics/reporting.py, kept CLI behavior unchanged via imports/re-exports, and verified the refactor with green lint, mypy, tests, and coverage.
Extracted command handlers into src/codex_metrics/commands.py with a typed Protocol boundary and lazy import from cli.main; verify and coverage remained green after the refactor.
Extracted storage and mutation helpers into src/codex_metrics/storage.py, kept CLI behavior unchanged via imports and re-exports, and verified the refactor with green lint, mypy, tests, and coverage.

Extracted record models, validation, summary computation, and attempt-sync helpers into src/codex_metrics/domain.py while preserving the existing CLI surface via imports and re-exports; verify and coverage remained green after restoring datetime/timezone compatibility for the shim-exported module surface.

Added focused domain tests for validation failures, unknown supersession references, attempt-history trimming and fallback paths, goal-type guardrails, and create/update/finalize edge cases; domain coverage rose to 90% and total coverage to 91% with full verify green.
Logged the retrospective for the layered CLI decomposition and the follow-up domain coverage pass in docs/retros, then reran the repository verify flow successfully.
Added compatibility and validation guardrails from the layered refactor retro to AGENTS.md, then reran the repository verify flow successfully.
Integrated history audit as a first-class command, extended verify coverage, and kept the implementation modular.
Documented the history audit command checkpoint, modular integration path, and verification changes.
Added the result_fit quality layer, exposed it through the CLI and report, and backfilled the clearest historical quality outcomes.
Documented why result_fit was added, why status was preserved, and why backfill remained curated.
Backfilled reviewed result_fit for the last clear manual audit candidate and confirmed the quality audit now only surfaces stale goals and low cost coverage.
Added audit-cost-coverage command with reason buckets and tests.
Logged the cost coverage audit retro and documented the new bottleneck in cost capture/recovery.
Added session token_count fallback for Codex usage recovery, verified with tests, and backfilled historical usage via sync-codex-usage.

Added an opt-in live E2E smoke that creates temporary metrics files, runs updater end-to-end against real local Codex telemetry, and verifies recovered tokens and cost match the selected rollout event exactly.
Added hardening tests for multi-event session sums, window filtering, tokens-only fallback, and legacy-path precedence over session recovery.
Logged a deep retro with 5 Whys for the session-based usage recovery investigation and the legacy-format extractor mismatch.
Captured the telemetry format mismatch root cause with 5 Whys and Theory of Constraints after adding session telemetry fallback and validating live usage recovery.
Reviewed unannotated one-attempt product goals and backfilled exact_fit only where confidence was high: no supersede chain, no fail history, accepted outcome notes, and single-attempt closure.
Reclassified zero-duration product goal windows from no_usage_data_found to incomplete_goal_window so cost audit points at too-narrow recorded boundaries instead of blaming telemetry absence.

Added a finalize-path guardrail that normalizes zero-duration closed product goals without stored cost/tokens into a one-second recovery window, plus regression tests for normalization and explicit-token exemptions.
Captured the zero-duration product window incident with 5 Whys and Theory of Constraints after shifting from strict rejection to finalize-path normalization for cost recovery windows.

Added bootstrap command that scaffolds metrics/report files, exports a codex-metrics policy, and manages an AGENTS.md block with dry-run and force safeguards. Verified with make verify and a clean temp-directory bootstrap smoke test.

Refactored bootstrap into a preflight/apply flow so conflicts are detected before writes, partial existing scaffold is completed safely, and report regeneration is explicit when metrics are recreated. Also normalized ValueError handling on script and module entrypoints, then verified with make verify and targeted QA temp-directory scenarios.

Added a canonical console_main wrapper so the installed codex-metrics console script, python -m entrypoint, and script shim all share the same friendly ValueError handling. Updated project.scripts to point at the wrapped entrypoint, added regression coverage, and reran make verify.

Recorded a retrospective for the bootstrap QA hardening pass, covering partial scaffold failures, non-destructive conflict handling, and the need to route the installed console script through a canonical wrapped entrypoint.

Codified bootstrap initializer guardrails in AGENTS.md and codex-metrics-policy.md: preflight-before-write, safe reruns, partial scaffold support, non-destructive conflict handling, and validation through real installed entrypoints. Verified with make verify.
Kept the bootstrap initializer guardrails only in local AGENTS.md and removed them from the reusable external policy file, then reran make verify to confirm the scope correction stayed clean.

Recorded a retrospective about retro-output classification failure and codified a local AGENTS.md rule requiring explicit scope classification for retrospective follow-up actions before they are promoted into rules, policy, tests, or left as incident history. Verified with make verify.

Recorded a focused incident retrospective for the external policy overreach mistake: a local bootstrap lesson was incorrectly promoted into the reusable policy layer. The permanent rule is to treat external policy changes as opt-in and require explicit reusability justification before promoting a lesson out of local rules or tests.

Added a README section with copy-paste instructions for installing codex-metrics into another repository, previewing bootstrap with --dry-run, applying the scaffold, and running the first goal workflow. Verified with make verify.

Switched package metadata to a single source of truth for versioning by making pyproject read codex_metrics.__version__. This keeps future updates to one version location instead of duplicated metadata. Verified with make verify.

Added README instructions for updating codex-metrics in an already bootstrapped downstream repository: upgrade the installed package, preview scaffold reconciliation with bootstrap --dry-run, apply bootstrap, and run show. Verified with make verify.

Updated README install and upgrade instructions to use pipx as the preferred standalone CLI path and python3/py as platform-specific fallbacks instead of assuming a bare python executable. Verified with make verify.

Added a practical standalone binary build path with PyInstaller one-file packaging, a local make target, CI matrix builds for macOS/Linux/Windows, and README guidance. Also made default pricing data loading freeze-friendly and locally verified the macOS binary with package-standalone plus standalone --help and bootstrap/show smoke checks.

Built standalone codex-metrics binaries via PyInstaller one-file packaging, added package-standalone target, added macOS/Linux/Windows CI matrix artifacts, updated README for standalone install/update flow, and validated with make verify, make package-standalone, local macOS standalone --help, and bootstrap/show smoke checks.

Added standalone binaries retrospective covering frozen-resource handling, PyInstaller local build friction, CI matrix artifact generation, standalone smoke checks, and downstream install/update guidance.

Clarified CLI help text so init is described as metrics/report-only initialization and bootstrap is described as full repository scaffold integration with AGENTS.md and policy; verified with source-tree help output and make verify.

Clarified README for standalone self-host usage: direct binaries must be invoked by path unless moved onto PATH, updated bootstrap and upgrade examples to use /path/to/codex-metrics, and added troubleshooting for zsh command-not-found; verified with make verify.

Added built-in shell completion support via codex-metrics completion bash|zsh, covered it with automated tests, and updated README with activation instructions for PATH-installed and standalone-by-path usage; verified with make verify.

Added retrospective for shell completion and standalone self-host UX, covering PATH assumptions, missing autocomplete, corrected README guidance, and built-in completion support as a permanent CLI surface.

Strengthened bootstrap installer output so the managed AGENTS.md block explains PATH-installed versus standalone-by-path invocation, the required Codex agent workflow, and retry/close/show commands; also updated the exported policy template with standalone path guidance and added bootstrap regression coverage; verified with targeted bootstrap tests and make verify.

Documented canonical standalone self-host install path via ~/bin/codex-metrics symlink in bootstrap-generated AGENTS guidance, exported policy template, and README rollout instructions; added regression assertions and verified with targeted bootstrap tests plus make verify.

Added install-self command to install the current executable into a stable user-local entrypoint, defaulting to ~/bin/codex-metrics; for script/module invocations it now writes a working launcher, for standalone binaries it links or copies the artifact; updated bootstrap-generated AGENTS guidance, exported policy template, README rollout docs, and regression tests; verified with targeted install-self tests, live launcher smoke, and make verify.

Finalized install-self: it now installs a working launcher, warns when the target directory is not on PATH, prints the exact export PATH line for the current shell profile, and is covered by regression tests plus full verify.

Rebuilt the standalone binary after adding install-self, verified that dist/standalone/codex-metrics now exposes install-self in top-level help and install-self --help, and confirmed the earlier invalid-choice error came from an outdated standalone artifact built before the new command existed.

Added opt-in shell profile update support to install-self via --write-shell-profile, so installer can append the target directory to ~/.zshrc or ~/.bashrc when it is not already on PATH; kept default behavior non-destructive, added regression tests for profile writing and idempotency, updated README, and verified with targeted tests plus make verify.
Added installer hardening retrospective covering stale standalone artifacts, PATH discoverability, launcher correctness, and the opt-in shell-profile update model for install-self.

Narrowed the bootstrap-generated AGENTS block to a policy include/reference plus artifact pointers, moved the operational usage contract fully into the exported policy template, updated regression tests to enforce that boundary, and verified with targeted bootstrap tests and make verify.

Refined the bootstrap-generated AGENTS block to an explicit Read first include pointing to AGENTS.md and docs/codex-metrics-policy.md with mandatory-policy wording; verified with bootstrap-focused tests and full make verify.

Clarified the exported codex-metrics policy for newly bootstrapped agents by adding What This Is, When It Applies, Key Terms, First Task Checklist, and an explicit retry command example; verified with bootstrap-focused tests and full make verify.

Removed generated-artifact references and manual-edit rules from the bootstrap-generated AGENTS include block so it now only points agents to AGENTS.md and the codex-metrics policy; kept the operational details in the exported policy template; verified with bootstrap-focused tests and full make verify.

Added retrospective for the AGENTS vs policy boundary drift in bootstrap-generated instructions, documenting why AGENTS should remain a read-first include while the policy owns the codex-metrics operational contract.

Added make package-refresh-global to rebuild sdist, wheel, and standalone binary, then run install-self for a global refresh; documented INSTALL_SELF_ARGS override and verified with make verify plus end-to-end make package-refresh-global INSTALL_SELF_ARGS=--target-dir /tmp/codex-metrics-bin.

Deduplicated local AGENTS against reusable codex-metrics policy: reduced AGENTS to repo-local tooling and process guardrails, moved reusable reporting/workflow semantics into policy, and verified with make verify.
Unified bootstrap and repo policy text under one canonical content and added a regression test to prevent drift.
Recorded the duplicate-policy-source incident and codified the runtime-package plus synchronized-mirror approach.
Reduced the policy to a compact agent-facing contract, kept the essential workflow and validation rules, and removed spec-like detail.
Added start-task, continue-task, and finish-task commands as high-level wrappers around update, with tests and docs.
Added a lightweight lifecycle pilot doc with lead-owned stage transitions, stage definitions, operating rules, and criteria for when to automate stage support in the tool.
Added recommended start-task, continue-task, and finish-task flow to the agent-facing policy and kept the packaged mirror in sync.
Recorded the gap where new workflow commands were documented in README but not in the agent-facing policy, and codified the recommended command flow there.
Added a local AGENTS rule that workflow-shaping CLI changes must update the agent-facing policy and packaged policy mirror.

Added a reusable instruction file that distills the highest-ROI practices from codex-metrics history for faster Python project development: diagnosis-first, guardrails, verification, typed boundaries, strong testing, and honest workflow boundaries.

Tightened the reusable instruction file to require test-first development, coverage from project start, mandatory lint/type analysis, active anti-copy-paste discipline, and explicit SOLID/DDD/GRASP architectural guidance.

Expanded the reusable instruction file with canonical verify-flow, layered architecture defaults, compatibility-contract thinking, audit-first metric diagnosis, bootstrap safety, and retrospective scope discipline based on codex-metrics lessons.
Removed tracked .idea files from git index while keeping them locally ignored via .gitignore so IDE noise stops polluting repository history.

Added a mandatory-rules-only AGENTS template for new Python projects with strict guidance on TDD, coverage, linting, type checking, anti-copy-paste discipline, layered architecture, validation, and definition of done.

Collapsed the reusable guidance down to a single concise AGENTS template and strengthened it with explicit strict-typing rules: strict or near-strict mypy, avoid Any without a clear boundary reason, and avoid raw untyped dicts in domain logic.

Expanded the reusable AGENTS template with stricter architecture rules: pure domain boundaries, explicit application layer, invariant ownership, composition over inheritance, and explicit dependencies over hidden shared state.

Added a dedicated retrospective logging block to the reusable Python project AGENTS template so meaningful bugs, false successes, and process misses are captured with a classified follow-up instead of disappearing into chat history.

Added a reusable process playbook covering PM discovery, lead-owned task creation, role separation, stage flow, and the rule that development should start from a clarified task rather than a raw request.
Strengthened local and reusable retrospective rules with explicit minimum sections, scope classification, and a recommendation to use 5 Whys and Theory of Constraints for significant incidents.
Added an explicit no-guessing invocation contract to local AGENTS and the reusable policy, and kept the packaged policy mirror in sync.
Moved the invocation contract out of local AGENTS and into the bootstrap-generated AGENTS block, with regression coverage.
Bootstrap now creates a repo-local tools/codex-metrics wrapper, and the generated AGENTS block points agents at that exact path.
install-self now warns when an active virtualenv shadows the global codex-metrics command, with regression coverage.
Added package-refresh-local and made package-refresh-global refresh the local .venv install before reinstalling the standalone binary globally.
Recorded the failed local refresh path where standalone/global installs were updated but the active .venv install remained stale, and documented the permanent fix.
Added a local validation rule to treat source-tree, .venv, and standalone/global installs as separate runnable surfaces and to verify the actual executable path when behavior looks stale.
Added TODO items for retrospective-time metrics quality audit and optional automatic task-metrics snapshots in retrospectives.
Rule added to AGENTS: treat other repositories' metrics as read-only analysis inputs unless explicit modification is requested.
Added top-level --version support to the CLI parser and covered script/module entrypoints in tests; make verify passed.

Added make dev-refresh-local using offline editable install, documented editable local refresh versus wheel refresh, reinstalled the local .venv package editable, and verified that source-tree, .venv/bin/codex-metrics, and python -m codex_metrics all report the same version.

Bumped the package version from 0.1.0 to 0.2.0, refreshed the editable local install so .venv/bin/codex-metrics reports the same version, replaced hardcoded wheel-version examples in README with placeholders, and made version tests follow PACKAGE_VERSION.

Version output is now git-derived in working repos, base-versioned in source snapshots without git, and metadata-backed in installed surfaces. Added unit coverage for git-first and metadata/source-layout fallback behavior, verified make verify, and confirmed make dev-refresh-local updates both .venv/bin/codex-metrics and python -m codex_metrics to the same auto-derived version string.

Logged a full retrospective for the CLI version drift incident: missing manual bump discipline, stale local install surfaces, the move to editable local refresh, and automatic git-derived version identity with explicit fallback rules.

Bootstrapped the codex-metrics repo itself so it now has the same repo-local tools/codex-metrics wrapper flow as downstream projects. Verified the wrapper exists, reports the current version, and runs show successfully.

Updated AGENTS.md so the codex-metrics repo now documents ./tools/codex-metrics as the canonical command path, with scripts/update_codex_metrics.py demoted to compatibility fallback. Verified the wrapper path with ./tools/codex-metrics show.

Removed the outdated script-first command example from AGENTS.md so local instructions now point only to ./tools/codex-metrics as the user-facing workflow. Verified the wrapper path with ./tools/codex-metrics show.

Updated bootstrap-generated wrapper semantics so tools/codex-metrics cds into its own repository root before exec. Added regression coverage for invocation from another working directory, verified make verify, updated the current repo wrapper, and confirmed /tmp path invocation still reads this repo's metrics.

Added a read-only external metrics snapshot directory under docs/audits and stored the current invest codex_metrics.json there with a README explaining that these files are point-in-time external raw data for analysis, not mutable project state.

Copy the current hhsave codex_metrics.json into the read-only external metrics snapshots directory so cross-project product analysis can compare another real repository without mutating its live files.

Added docs/audits/external-metrics-snapshots/hhsave-codex_metrics-2026-03-31.json as a read-only external snapshot for cross-project product analysis. Verified the snapshot directory contents and regenerated metrics/report through the CLI workflow.

Added docs/product-hypotheses.md as the local product and metrics hypothesis log, updated AGENTS.md to require hypothesis-driven PM framing and re-evaluation, and clarified in docs/product-framing.md that unconfirmed product ideas stay in the hypothesis log until validated.

Logged a dedicated retrospective for the shift to hypothesis-driven PM, and extended docs/product-hypotheses.md with process hypotheses about lead-mediated task flow, early PM discovery, and codified retrospective follow-up.
